report.summary: UX audited 2 new learn guides (Lido V3 stVaults, Institutional Crypto Adoption 2026), confirmed OG images exist, added global scroll-margin-top for anchor links, fixed BackToTop placement on institutional page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added global scroll-margin-top: 80px to all [id] elements in globals.css — fixes anchor link jumps hiding headings under sticky nav across all pages
Fixed BackToTop component placement on institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026 page (moved inside <article> tag for consistency with other learn guides)
Verified all TOC anchor links match section IDs on both new pages (8 sections each, all aligned)
Audited responsive grid layouts — both pages use auto-fit minmax(250-280px, 1fr) grids that collapse properly on mobile
Confirmed ARIA labels present on TOC nav elements on both pages
Verified touch targets on badges (12px font with padding meets minimum for non-critical UI elements)
Confirmed both pages have proper breadcrumb navigation, structured data (Article + FAQ schemas), and disclaimer sections

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image already existed: og-lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — stVaults architecture diagram with Lido blue + brand gradient, validator/DeFi/restaking node visualization
OG image already existed: og-institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — institutional building illustrations (BlackRock, JPMorgan, Citi) with brand gradient accent bar
Both OG images follow degen0x design system: dark bg (#080d1c), accent gradient bar, Inter font, decorative glow effects, degen0x.com branding

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (No Action Needed)
items: Both pages follow progressive complexity pattern with Intermediate-level badges
Both pages use gradient h1 titles (linear-gradient 135deg #6366f1 → #06b6d4) consistent with brand
Both pages have proper loading-state-ready structure (static content renders immediately, no client-side data fetching needed for learn guides)
Lido page has step-by-step flow cards with cyan left border accent for visual hierarchy
Institutional page has data grid cards for BlackRock stats and sortable-style institution table with overflowX: auto for mobile
Both FAQ sections use native <details> elements for accessible expand/collapse
Both pages include internal links to related guides (4-6 links each) supporting site retention

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026 — 1156 lines, 8 sections, 6 FAQs, glass card design, DeFi yield loop visualization
/learn/institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026 — 1447 lines, 8 sections + FAQ + related reading, institution data table, timeline cards
